title: Hello World
content:
Quick StartCreate a new post$ hexo new "My New Post"

More info: Writing
Run server$ hexo server

More info: Server
Generate static files$ hexo generate

More info: Generating
Deploy to remote sites$ hexo deploy

More info: Deployment

title: 2023年1月时间安排表
content:
目标

运动

跑步100公里

阅读

1.《富爸爸穷爸爸》2.《复盘》

冥想

每天5分钟


日程安排

早上锻炼：

6:00 起床6:00-6:30 跑步6:30-7:30 写作

白天上班: 

8:00 - 16:00 

晚上学习: 

16:00 - 18:00 吃饭休息18:00 - 20:00 背单词20:00 - 21:30 学高数21:30 - 23:00 阅读休息（总结复盘）


关键点：

每天2000ml水每天阅读60分钟每周两次博客输出清淡饮食 早睡早起每周一次深度护肤每天晚上11点放下手机

title: American Authors - Pride (Radio Mix / American Sign Language Video)
content:
(function(){var player = new DPlayer({"container":document.getElementById("dplayer0"),"theme":"#FADFA3","loop":true,"video":{"url":"https://img.yaojian.cc/video/American%20Authors%20-%20Pride.mp4","pic":"https://img.yaojian.cc/picgo/American%20Authors%20-%20Pride.JPG"}});window.dplayers||(window.dplayers=[]);window.dplayers.push(player);})()

Video features award winning actress Sandra Mae Frank who most recently starred as the lead of Deaf West Theater’s ground-breaking & critically acclaimed Broadway revival of Spring Awakening. She previously studied at Gallaudet University, the only deaf university with a degree in Theatre Art. For more information about Sandra at www.sandramaefrank.com/ .  #deaftalent
“What We Live For” OUT NOW:iTunes: http://smarturl.it/WhatWeLiveForPreAmazon: http://smarturl.it/aWhatWeLiveForPreGoogle Play: http://smarturl.it/gWhatWeLiveForPre
